backend.changelog: Generate now remembers, per cached CAD file, which platform version it last downloaded - so repeat runs skip re-downloading drawings and parts that are already current (drawing phase drops from hours to minutes on large assemblies from the second run), and outdated locally-cached assemblies are refreshed automatically even on a first run, eliminating the blocking 'Unable to load revision A.1 - will use B.1' SolidWorks dialogs caused by stale local copies.

cadBridge.changelog: Per-file freshness index now works on all tenant caches (including those storing files under friendly names) and a drawing shared by multiple BOM items is downloaded once per run instead of once per item. Includes 1.8.74 (freshness index: repeat runs reuse current files, outdated cached assemblies refresh automatically, interrupted runs keep progress) and 1.8.73 (drawing PDFs contain ALL non-DXF sheets - clear the generated-files cache or Force Regenerate once so existing incomplete PDFs are rewritten).
